name: Plum Tomato Salsa with Sherry Vinegar
recipeIngredient: Seeded, and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
1 Serrano chile, seeded and sliced thin
1/2 teaspoon Chopped fresh thyme, or 1/4 teaspoon dried thyme
Salt and ground black pepper to taste.
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the plum tomatoes into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Slice the shallot thinly.
3. Seed and slice the serrano chile thinly.
4. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
5. Season with salt and ground black pepper to taste.
6. Mix gently until well combined.
7. Serve within 2 hours.
